name: Benton Park
description: Benton Park is a place to play pickleball in St. Louis, MO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Boys & Girls Club of Greater St. Louis - Adams Park Club
description: Come play pickleball at Boys & Girls Club of Greater St. Louis - Adams Park Club in St. Louis, MO! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Brentwood Swim and Pickleball club
description: Come play pickleball at Brentwood Swim and Pickleball club in St. Louis, MO! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Brinkop Park
description: Brinkop Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Louis, MO. There is 1 outdoor hard and asphalt court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights and restrooms. The court is free.

name: Carondelet Park Rec Complex
description: Carondelet Park Rec Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Louis, MO. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Carondelet Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Carondelet Tennis Courts in St. Louis, MO! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: CID - Central Institute for the Deaf
description: CID - Central Institute for the Deaf is a place to play pickleball in St. Louis, MO. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts are private. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Columbus Square Pickleball Courts
description: Columbus Square Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in St. Louis, MO. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
address: City of St. Louis Columbus Square Pickleball and Tennis Courts Park

name: Dwight Davis Tennis Center
description: Dwight Davis Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in St. Louis, MO. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and lights.
open_play_schedule: 4 Dedicated Pickleball Courts Open When The Tennis Center Is Open (8am-10pm Weekdays, 8am-4pm Weekends; closed weekends in the winter). Open Play Thurs & Sat 9am-12pm

name: Edward Jones YMCA
description: Edward Jones YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Louis, MO. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

description: It is $5 to play in the mornings and the Dwight Davis Tennis Center also has leagues and tournament play; see https://www.dwightdavistennis.com/pickleball

name: Kaufman Park
description: Kaufman Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Louis, MO. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
